hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' && ~/.cargo/bin/cargo fmt; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' || exit 0; ~/.cargo/bin/cargo check 2>&1 || exit 2; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' || exit 0; ~/.cargo/bin/cargo clippy 2>&1 || exit 2; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qiE 'test|spec' || exit 0; ~/.cargo/bin/cargo test 2>&1 || exit 2; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qiE 'test|spec' && exit 0; count=$(grep -o 'unwrap()' "$f" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$count" -gt 0 ] && jq -n --arg m "Warning: $count unwrap() in $f - use ? or expect() with a message instead" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$m}}'; exit 0; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' || exit 0; grep -qE 'pub (fn|struct|trait|enum|type)' "$f" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; ~/.cargo/bin/cargo doc --no-deps 2>&1 || exit 2; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '(^|/)config\.toml$' && ! echo "$f" | grep -q 'example'; then echo '{"decision":"ask","reason":"config.toml may contain live AWS credentials/account IDs — confirm this edit is intentional"}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'aws .*(delete|terminate|remove|revoke)'; then echo '{"decision":"ask","reason":"Destructive AWS CLI operation detected — please confirm"}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
